steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a similarity,” meaning showing what both EPDM rubber and single-ply NiTi wire have in COMMON—not what distinguishes them. Both materials exhibit the same fundamental response to twisting: they heat up.

steps.title: Select the choice that parallels both materials
steps.content:
The correct answer directly accomplishes the goal: both EPDM rubber and single-ply NiTi wire heat up when twisted, showing their shared response according to the study.

The other three either highlight temperature contrast, treat the materials as incidental examples, or omit them entirely.

That confirms A is correct.
